role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal market circumstances, the advisor will maintain at least 80% exposure to financial instruments that provide two times inverse leveraged exposure to the daily performance of NBIS. The fund is non-diversified.
